_instructions: Fill in your details here, then import via Settings > Import Profile in the extension, OR paste directly into Chrome DevTools > Application > Local Storage > jobfill_profile.
summary: Experienced software engineer with 5+ years building scalable web applications using React, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure. Passionate about clean architecture and developer experience.
coverLetter: I am excited to apply for this opportunity. With my background in software engineering and a track record of delivering high-quality products, I am confident I would be a strong addition to your team. I look forward to discussing how my skills align with your goals.
